allow: PowerShell($backendRunning = try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $r.StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $false }; $frontendRunning = try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $r.StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $false }; Write-Host "Backend: $backendRunning"; Write-Host "Frontend: $frontendRunning")

PowerShell($backendRunning = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2\).StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $false }; $frontendRunning = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2\).StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $false }; if \($backendRunning\) { Write-Host "Backend OK" } else { Write-Host "Backend DOWN" }; if \($frontendRunning\) { Write-Host "Frontend OK" } else { Write-Host "Frontend DOWN" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:APPDATA\\obsidian" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\obsidian" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
